svg.title: 00 / HRM macOS shared keymap layer
svg.desc: Base layer rendered once on the shared superset layout with keyboard margins overlaid.
svg.text: Base layer rendered once on the shared superset layout with keyboard margins overlaid.
Visual order: BSPC / TAB / Alt · RAlt / ESC / SPC
Corne ghosts: transparent disabled key before BSPC · transparent disabled key after SPC
GO60 + Glove80: physical six-key thumb order · matches visual order
Keys are rendered once from the shared layer; colored margins show which physical region exists on each smaller keyboard. Glove80 is the full superset.
